articles.title: Boulter and Venus Williams: An Unlikely Doubles Duo in Madrid
articles.summary: Katie Boulter called Venus Williams an 'absolute icon' after they won their first doubles match together at the Madrid Open. The 45-year-old legend is on a losing streak, but this win brought back the magic.

articles.title: Alcaraz Out of French Open: Wrist Injury Sidelines Two-Time Champion
articles.summary: Two-time defending champion Carlos Alcaraz will miss the French Open due to a right wrist injury. The 22-year-old also withdrew from the Italian Open, opening the door for rival Jannik Sinner to complete his career Grand Slam.

articles.title: Gauff Battles Through Stomach Virus to Win in Madrid
articles.summary: Coco Gauff vomited into a bin during her match but still came back to beat Sorana Cirstea 4-6, 7-5, 6-1. She's the latest player hit by a virus sweeping through the Madrid Open.
